Trading Education • 2/8/2026 • 9 min read

Forex Trading Strategies: Proven Methods

Overview of proven forex trading strategies: trend following, counter-trend, breakout, and swing trading approaches.

MakeTrades Team
MakeTrades Expert

Trend Following Strategies

Trend following is the most reliable approach for intermediate traders. Use moving average crossovers (50/200 EMA) for direction, enter on pullbacks to dynamic support levels, and trail stops using ATR-based calculations. This method captures the middle portion of trends while avoiding the noise of tops and bottoms. Works best on H4 and daily timeframes.

Breakout and Range Strategies

Breakout strategies capitalize on price escaping established ranges. Identify consolidation zones on higher timeframes, then trade the breakout with confirmation from volume and momentum indicators. Range-bound strategies profit from mean reversion between support and resistance, using oscillators like RSI to time entries near range extremes.

Swing Trading Approach

Swing trading holds positions for 2-10 days, capturing multi-day price moves. Combine weekly trend analysis with daily entry signals. Use Fibonacci retracements for entry zones and previous swing highs/lows for target levels. This style suits traders who cannot monitor markets continuously but want to actively manage positions beyond simple buy-and-hold.
